claim: The Knesset OData v4 API base URL is https://knesset.gov.il/OdataV4/ParliamentInfo/
The API is OData v4 and requires no authentication
The full schema (field names, types, relationships) is exposed at the $metadata endpoint
Available tables are discoverable by querying the base URL
In OData v4, the primary key field for all Knesset tables is always 'Id' (not BillID, PersonID, CommitteeID, etc.)
KNS_CommitteeSession StatusID 193 represents a cancelled session
MK position IDs: 43 = ח"כ (male MK), 61 = ח"כית (female MK), 41 = committee chair, 54 = faction member
GroupTypeID 28 in KNS_DocumentPlenumSession identifies the official Divrei HaKnesset transcript
Knesset number 0 in the system represents the Provisional State Council (מועצת המדינה הזמנית)
Data quality in the Knesset database improves significantly from Knesset 17 onward; older records may have gaps
KNS_Law and KNS_DocumentLaw exist only in the v2 API; in v4 those records moved into KNS_Bill
KNS_PlenumVote uses the field VoteTitle for the vote description; the field ItemTitle does not exist on this table
KNS_PlenumVoteResult uses MkId (not PersonID) as the MK foreign key, and ResultDesc (not ResultCode) for the outcome
KNS_Query stores the ministry as GovMinistryID (integer foreign key), not a text name field
Sorting KNS_PlmSessionItem by Ordinal is a known API bug and results are unreliable
The table name KNS_IsraelLawClassificiation contains an intentional double-'i' typo in the API
